description:
To properly set the permissions of /var/log/gdm3/*, run the command: 
$ sudo chmod 0660 /var/log/gdm3/*
rationale:
The <tt>/var/log/gdm3</tt> directory contains information about the GDM daemon
and should only be accessed by authorized personnel.
ocil:
To check the permissions of /var/log/gdm3/*, run the command: 
$ ls -l /var/log/gdm3/*
If properly configured, the output should indicate the following permissions: -rw-rw----
title: Verify Permissions of Files in /var/log/gdm3
